marshmallow.name: MARSHMALLOW
marshmallow.description: Marshmallow is a fun, forgiving beach break on Sri Lanka's south coast. It is popular with beginners, surf schools, and surfers looking for soft playful waves close to shore.
marshmallow.waves: Soft, rolling waves breaking over sand. Marshmallow has a mellow takeoff zone and forgiving conditions, making it ideal for learning, improving fundamentals, and enjoying relaxed surf sessions.
marshmallow.hazards: Generally one of the safer breaks in the area thanks to its sandy bottom. Main hazards are crowds during peak season, beginner traffic in the lineup, and occasional currents when larger swells are running.
marshmallow.best: Clean morning winds and small-to-medium south-west swells usually provide the best conditions. Marshmallow works across a wide tide range but is often most user-friendly around mid tide.

host.name: Follow The White Rabbit
host.description: Oceanfront restaurant directly overlooking Marshmallow surf spot, with coffee, breakfast, seafood, sunset drinks, and a clear view of the lineup.

featuredPartners.title: Marshmallow Surf School
featuredPartners.description: Private beginner and intermediate surf lessons directly at Marshmallow Point.

featuredPartners.title: Surf Photography
featuredPartners.description: Water photography, beach shots, and drone clips for your best waves.

services.title: Scooter Rental
services.description: Daily scooter rentals close to the surf spot.

services.title: Surf Shop
services.description: Wax, fins, leashes, ding repair, and board rentals nearby.

services.title: Accommodation
services.description: Guesthouses and rooms within walking distance of the break.

mirissa-point.name: MIRISSA POINT
mirissa-point.description: Mirissa Point is a scenic reef and point setup with long walls on the right swell. A great spot to check before driving across the south coast.
mirissa-point.waves: Longer, cleaner walls can appear when the swell direction lines up. Smaller days can be playful, while bigger days are better for experienced surfers.
mirissa-point.hazards: Reef, rocks, crowds, and changing currents. Respect local surfers and avoid paddling out beyond your ability.
mirissa-point.best: Early mornings with light offshore wind and organised south-west swell are usually best.

host.name: Mirissa Beach Partner
host.description: A local ocean-view partner helping keep the Mirissa Point camera online.

featuredPartners.title: Beach Coffee
featuredPartners.description: Coffee and breakfast close to the point.

services.title: Board Rental
services.description: Shortboards, funboards, and longboards available nearby.

temple-point.name: TEMPLE POINT
temple-point.description: Temple Point is a beautiful surf zone with clear water, tropical scenery, and changing conditions depending on swell and tide.
temple-point.waves: Can produce clean, fun walls when swell and tide match. Best for surfers who are comfortable around reef.
temple-point.hazards: Reef, shallow sections, currents, and occasional crowd pressure.
temple-point.best: Morning sessions with clean wind and moderate swell are usually the safest bet.

host.name: Temple Point Host
host.description: Local host supporting the LankaSwell camera network near Temple Point.

services.title: Local Food
services.description: Rice and curry, fresh juice, and post-surf meals nearby.

services.title: Transport
services.description: Tuk-tuk and scooter options for moving between surf spots.
